page_content:
Prerequisite: NFSC380.

Corequisite: NFSC440.

NFSC456 Medical Nutrition Therapy II (4 Credits)

Modifications of the normal adequate diet to meet human nutritional needs in acute and chronic diseases and metabolic disorders. Prerequisite: Minimum of C- in NFSC380 and NFSC440; and permission of AGNR-Nutrition and Food Science department.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
